JDEARMAN, JUDGE; AHUIE, CLERK; CSR - NOT REPORTED. CAUSE ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 613 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JONATHAN HERSCHEL BORNSTEIN APP. FOR PLTF. JOHN ERIC STRINGER APP. FOR DEFTS. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRAZIER, JAMES FRAZIER, KAREN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 282 ST. DEF TO DISMISS RENT BOARD ACTION BY 9/7/99. SECUR- ITY DEPOSIT FORFEITED. SEE JUDGMENT FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY CONDITIONS.
